items.title: Sources: Man Utd to offer Carrick two year deal
items.summary: Manchester United are progressing with talks with Michael Carrick about taking the head coach's job permanently, sources told ESPN.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Rew, Abell, Lammonby give Somerset solid start
items.summary: Trio of half-centuries set up hosts, as captain continues prolific form and Rew celebrates England call-up
